name: css-module-explainer
description: Go to Definition, Hover, Autocomplete, Diagnostics, Quick Fixes, and Find References for classnames/bind cx() patterns with CSS Modules.

scripts.build: pnpm cme-check run core/clean && rolldown -c rolldown.config.ts && pnpm cme-check run core/build/engine-shadow-runner && pnpm cme-check run core/build/omena-lsp-server && pnpm cme-check run core/build/tsgo-binary
scripts.check:eslint-plugin-smoke: pnpm exec tsc -b server/engine-core-ts server/engine-host-node && node --import tsx ./scripts/check-eslint-plugin-smoke.ts

cssModuleExplainer.features.definition.description: Enable Go to Definition for cx() class names.

cssModuleExplainer.features.hover.description: Enable hover information for cx() class names.

cssModuleExplainer.features.references.description: Enable Find References for CSS class selectors.

cssModuleExplainer.features.rename.description: Enable Rename Symbol for CSS class selectors across SCSS and TS/TSX files.

cssModuleExplainer.diagnostics.severity.description: Severity level for unresolved class diagnostics.

cssModuleExplainer.diagnostics.unusedSel.description: Show hints for CSS class selectors that are declared but never referenced in any TS/TSX file.

cssModuleExplainer.diagnostics.missingMo.description: Warn when 'import styles from ...' for a CSS Module cannot be resolved on disk.

cssModuleExplainer.hover.maxCandidates.description: Maximum template/variable candidates shown in hover.

cssModuleExplainer.typeFactBackend.markdownDescription: Type-fact backend used by the language server. `tsgo` uses the extension-bundled TS 7 native compiler and does not build a synchronous current-TS program on the LSP request path. `tsgo-workspace` uses `pnpm exec tsgo` in the user workspace.

cssModuleExplainer.lspServerRuntime.markdownDescription: Language-server runtime. `auto` uses the bundled or built Rust `omena-lsp-server` and fails fast if no binary is available. `omena-lsp-server` requires the bundled binary, explicit `CME_OMENA_LSP_SERVER_PATH`, or explicit `CME_OMENA_LSP_SERVER_COMMAND` command.

cssModuleExplainer.pathAlias.markdownDescription: Resource-scoped import alias map for CSS Module paths. Keys are non-relative import prefixes, values are workspace-relative or absolute target paths.

cssModuleExplainer.scss.classnameTransfo.markdownDescription: Mirror of css-loader's `modules.localsConvention`. Controls how CSS class selectors are exposed to JS/TS — e.g. `.btn-primary` is reachable as `styles['btn-primary']` (`asIs`), both that and `styles.btnPrimary` (`camelCase`), or only `styles.btnPrimary` (`camelCaseOnly`). Port your `css-loader` setting verbatim.
